name: Salmon Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz package fresh Caesar salad mix (includes lettuce, dressing, croutons, and Parmesan cheese)
1 small yellow, red, and/or green bell pepper, julienned into strips
6 ounces smoked salmon, skinned/boned and broken into chunks - OR -
3 ounces thinly sliced smoked salmon (lox style), skinned/boned and in bite-size pieces - OR -
4 ounces grilled or canned salmon, skinned/boned and broken into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large salad bowl, combine the lettuce and dressing from the salad mix.
2. Add the sweet pepper strips and olives.
3. Toss mixture gently to coat.
4. Add the croutons and cheese from the mix and the salmon.
5. Toss together before serving.
6. Makes 3 main dish servings.
Note: If you can't find packaged Caesar salad mix, substitute with 5 cups torn mixed greens, 1/3 cup croutons, 3 tablespoons bottled Caesar or ranch salad dressing, and 2 tablespoons grated Parmesan cheese.
